name: radicale
description: CalDAV and CardDAV workflow skills for Radicale.

interface.shortDescription: Manage CalDAV calendars and CardDAV contacts through Radicale.
interface.longDescription: Radicale packages calendar and contact workflows for inspecting collections, managing events or contacts, and troubleshooting CalDAV/CardDAV state.
defaultPrompt: Use Radicale to inspect calendar collections.
Check whether the CalDAV endpoint is reachable.
